inputs.label: Target Plant Population (plants/ha)
inputs.businessContext: Desired number of plants per hectare at harvest. Based on agronomic recommendations for specific crop and region.

inputs.label: Germination Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of seeds expected to germinate. Determined by seed lot testing (ISTA standards).

inputs.label: Seedling Survival Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of germinated seeds that survive to establish. Accounts for field conditions, pests, etc.

inputs.label: Thousand Seed Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of 1000 seeds in grams. Varies by crop variety; used to convert seed count to weight.

inputs.label: Row Spacing (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Distance between rows. Affects plant density and seed rate calculation.

inputs.label: Seed Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of seed per kilogram. Used for economic analysis.

inputs.label: Field Area (ha)
inputs.businessContext: Total area to be planted. Used to calculate total seed required and cost.

inputs.label: Data Confidence (%)
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data. Adjusts final recommendation for risk.

thresholds.germinationRate < 80: Low germination rate may require higher seed rate or seed treatment.
thresholds.seedlingSurvivalRate < 75: Low survival rate indicates poor field conditions; consider increasing seed rate.
thresholds.seedCostPerKg > 20: High seed cost; consider precision planting to reduce waste.

suggestedActions: germinationRate < 80 ? 'Consider seed priming or treatment to improve germination.' : ''
seedlingSurvivalRate < 75 ? 'Improve field preparation and pest control.' : ''
seedCostPerKg > 20 ? 'Use precision seeding to reduce seed waste.' : ''
